title: leucaena involucrata
intro: Leucaena involucrata, also known as the Guatemalan mesquite or Guanacaste tree, is a tropical legume native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The leaves and pods of the plant have been found to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and aiding in digestion. Leucaena involucrata can be prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal supplements.
